title: Suomen kieli - Finnish Language Quizzes
description: Practice your Finnish language skills with interactive quizzes

topics.title: Kellonaika
topics.description: Learn to tell time in Finnish - yli, vaille, puoli, and more!

topics.title: Sää
topics.description: Describe weather in Finnish - sataa, aurinko paistaa, astetta, and more!

topics.title: Kuukaudet
topics.description: Learn Finnish month names and inessive suffixes (-ssa/-ssä) - tammikuussa, helmikuussa, and more!

topics.title: Suku ja sukulaiset
topics.description: Learn Finnish family vocabulary - äiti, isä, sisko, veli, and asking about family!

topics.title: Vaatteet ja värit
topics.description: Learn Finnish clothing vocabulary and colors - paita, housut, punainen, sininen!

topics.title: Astevaihtelu (KPT)
topics.description: Practice KPT consonant changes with Type 1 verbs, negatives, nouns, and special cases!

topics.title: Partitiivi
topics.description: Practice the partitive case with negatives, numbers (2+), and partitive verbs!

topics.title: Olla-verbi
topics.description: Practice I am (minä olen) and I have (minulla on) sentences!

topics.title: Kysymyslauseet
topics.description: Practice Finnish yes/no questions (-ko) and question words!

topics.title: Verbityypit
topics.description: Practice conjugating Finnish verbs in spoken Finnish (puhekieli) - all 6 verb types!

topics.title: Imperfekti
topics.description: Practice Finnish past tense - add -i- before endings! olin, kävin, tulin, mulla oli

topics.title: Paikallissijat (Missä)
topics.description: Practice Finnish location cases - missä? -ssa/-ssä (inside) vs -lla/-llä (outside/surface)

topics.title: Sanatyypit
topics.description: Practice i-type (vesi→veden), e-type (huone→huoneen), nen-type (ihminen→ihmisen) + possessive suffixes!

topics.title: Omistusrakenne
topics.description: Practice 'I have' sentences with adessive case - minulla on, sulla on, Liisalla on! + feelings & negatives

topics.title: Postpositiot
topics.description: Practice Finnish postpositions (alla, päällä, vieressä, takana, etc.) and their use with cases!

topics.title: Eksistentiaalilauseet
topics.description: Practice Finnish existential sentences (on olemassa, pöydällä on kirja, kadulla on auto, etc.)

topics.title: Imperatiivi
topics.description: Practice Finnish imperative forms (commands, requests, suggestions) for all persons!

topics.title: Intonation
topics.description: Learn Finnish intonation patterns - falling vs. continuation pitch and how they affect meaning

topics.title: Positive Imperfect Tense
topics.description: Master the imperfect tense for talking about completed past actions - the storytelling tense!

topics.title: Expressing Opinion
topics.description: Learn how to express opinions using musta/mielestä and talk about likes and dislikes

topics.title: SVO Sentence
topics.description: Master the most common Finnish sentence pattern and understand object cases (partitive, nominative, genitive)

topics.title: Predicative Sentence
topics.description: Learn predicative sentences and how countable/uncountable subjects affect adjective cases

topics.title: Necessive Structure
topics.titleEn: Must Do / Have To - Necessity Expressions
topics.description: Express what you MUST do or HAVE TO do: Genitive + Must verb + Basic form verb

topics.title: KPT Change - Advanced
topics.description: Master KPT changes in Verb Types 3, 4, and 6 - opposite of Type 1!

topics.title: Kulkuvälineet
topics.description: Learn to say 'by bus, by train, by bicycle' — add -lla/-llä to any vehicle word!

topics.title: Asiakaspalvelu
topics.description: Practice Finnish phrases for phone calls, hotel check-in, and restaurant situations

topics.title: Järjestysluvut
topics.description: Learn Finnish ordinal numbers (1st, 2nd, 3rd...) and how to express dates — eka tammikuuta!

topics.title: Suunnistus
topics.description: Learn Finnish direction vocabulary and imperative forms — vasemmalle, oikealle, eteenpäin!

topics.title: Pronominit eri sijoissa
topics.description: Master Finnish personal pronouns in all case forms — mua, mun, musta, mulla, multa, mulle!
